goal: 找出『Claude 開場不讀/不遵守全域設定』的可靠解方：Codex 任 Tech Lead 設計、Claude 供實證與草案、agy 對抗質疑檢驗真實性與有效性；本輪只產出經對抗檢驗的提案，不部署
preflight_permissions: 僅寫 outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/；呼叫 codex exec 與 agy headless；不改 settings.json/hooks 實檔（部署另立契約待 PO 核准）

acceptance.desc: 問題簡報含本 session 可查證實證（hook 輸出 byte 數、截斷點、hook 原始碼行號），agy 核實無捏造

evidence.cmd: grep -q '版控鐵律' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/BRIEF.md && grep -q '7 條全 CONFIRMED' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/VERIFY_ROUND1.md && grep -q '13:26' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/VERIFY_ROUND1.md

acceptance.desc: Codex 產出解方設計，核心機制屬機器強制（PreToolUse/Stop 等），非提醒式文字

evidence.cmd: grep -q 'permissionDecision' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/PROPOSAL.md && grep -q 'PreToolUse：主要強制點' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/PROPOSAL.md && grep -q 'deny reason 只作說明，不是強制來源' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/PROPOSAL.md

acceptance.desc: agy 逐條質疑 Claude 陳述與 Codex 提案，每條重大質疑有回應或修正紀錄

evidence.cmd: grep -q 'R1' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/VERIFY_ROUND2.md && grep -q 'feature-detect' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/PROPOSAL.md && grep -q '不得再引用「8 次」' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/PROPOSAL.md && grep -q '死循環' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/PROPOSAL.md

acceptance.desc: 最終提案含可執行變更清單（檔案/位置/新內容）與部署驗證步驟，明列待 PO 核准

evidence.cmd: grep -q 'PO 核准點 4' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/PROPOSAL.md && grep -q '變更清單' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/PROPOSAL.md && grep -q '須 PO 明確授權' outputs/ody-session-compliance-20260715/PROPOSAL.md
